metadata.description: Display name for the workbook in Sentinel
Unique ID for the workbook resource
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace (e.g., /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{ws})

properties.serializedData: {"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# ACSC Priority Logs — Coverage & Posture Dashboard\n\n> Maps [ASD/ACSC Priority Logs for SIEM Ingestion](https://www.cyber.gov.au/business-government/detecting-responding-to-threats/event-logging/implementing-siem-soar-platforms/priority-logs-for-siem-ingestion-practitioner-guidance) guidance to your Microsoft Sentinel & Defender XDR telemetry."},"name":"title"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"Import the full workbook JSON from the repository file: `Outputs/workbooks/acsc-priority-logs-coverage.workbook`"},"name":"placeholder"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
